heading: Enforcement
label: 9834 Enforcement
text: For the imposition of tax on any failure of a group health plan to meet the requirements of this chapter, see section 4980D.
notes: Effective DateSection applicable with respect to group health plans for plan years beginning after the date that is one year after , see , set out as an Effective Date of 2008 Amendment note under .May 21, 2008section 103(f)(2) of Pub. L. 110–233section 9802 of this title
